creator: dfilter@FreeBSD.ORG
text:
philip      2006-11-02 00:38:06 UTC

  FreeBSD ports repository

  Modified files:
    devel                Makefile 
    devel/lua-posix      Makefile 
    devel/lua-posix/files patch-Makefile 
    devel/lua50-posix    Makefile 
  Added files:
    devel/lua-posix/files extrapatch-50-Makefile 
                          extrapatch-51-lposix.c 
                          extrapatch-51-posix.lua 
                          extrapatch-51-test.lua 
  Removed files:
    devel/lua50-posix    distinfo 
    devel/lua50-posix/files patch-Makefile patch-posix.lua 
  Log:
  Add devel/lua-posix to work with Lua 5.0 and Lua 5.1 and turn devel/lua-posix
  into a slave port of it.
  
  PR:             ports/104990
  Submitted by:   Andrew Turner <andrew+ports@fubar.geek.nz> (maintainer)
  Repocopy by:    marcus
  
  Revision  Changes    Path
